page.title: Scheduled Tasks
page.subtitle: Design, schedule, and operate recurring AI workflows from a clearer task studio.

runtime.title: Detached tasks and Task Flow
runtime.description: Inspect the latest OpenClaw runtime ledger for detached background tasks and orchestration flows without leaving the task studio.

taskBoard.title: Runtime task board
taskBoard.description: Recent detached task runs exposed by the latest OpenClaw tasks surface.
taskBoard.unsupportedBody: This connected runtime does not expose the latest detached task board yet.
taskBoard.empty: No detached runtime tasks have been reported by this instance yet.
taskBoard.summaryFallback: No runtime summary was provided for this task.

detail.description: Inspect detached task detail fields returned by OpenClaw tasks.show.
detail.unavailable: Runtime task details are unavailable for this runtime.
detail.loadFailed: Runtime task details could not be loaded.

taskFlows.title: Task Flow board
taskFlows.description: Recent Task Flow records, including goal, current step, and live orchestration state from the latest OpenClaw task-flow surface.
taskFlows.unsupportedBody: This connected runtime does not expose the latest Task Flow surface yet.
taskFlows.empty: No Task Flow records have been reported by this instance yet.
taskFlows.summaryFallback: No flow summary was provided for this record.

detail.description: Inspect detail-only Task Flow fields returned by OpenClaw tasks.flow.show.
detail.linkedTasksDescription: Tasks linked to this Task Flow according to OpenClaw tasks.flow.show.
detail.linkedTasksEmpty: No linked tasks were returned for this Task Flow.
detail.unavailable: Task Flow details are unavailable for this runtime.
detail.loadFailed: Task Flow details could not be loaded.

empty.title: No scheduled tasks yet
empty.description: Create your first task to automate recurring analysis, summaries, and delivery workflows.
empty.noInstanceDescription: Choose an active instance before creating or managing scheduled tasks.

scheduleModeHelp.interval: Run every selected number of minutes, hours, or days.
scheduleModeHelp.datetime: Run on one specific date and time.
scheduleModeHelp.cron: Use a raw 5- or 6-field cron expression for full control.

cards.noExecutionYet: This task has no execution history yet.

fields.enabledHelp: Disabled tasks are created paused so you can review them safely.
fields.promptPlaceholder: Describe what should happen every time this task runs...
fields.promptHelp: Keep the prompt outcome-focused so repeated runs stay reliable.
fields.cronTimezoneHelp: Optional IANA timezone. Leave empty to use the runtime default.
fields.staggerMsHelp: Optional deterministic spread window for recurring cron runs. Use 0 to keep exact timing.
fields.schedulePreviewPending: Complete the schedule inputs to generate a preview.
fields.cronPreviewPending: A cron preview will appear here when available.
fields.customSessionIdHelp: Persistent custom sessions keep context between scheduled runs.
fields.deleteAfterRunHelp: One-shot jobs can remove themselves automatically after a successful run.
fields.deliveryChannelHelp: Optional. Pick where summaries should be announced, or leave empty to reuse the last route.
fields.noConnectedChannels: No connected delivery channels are available yet.
fields.recipientHelp: Optional announce target such as a room, group, or contact.
fields.webhookUrlHelp: Use a valid HTTP(S) endpoint to receive finished cron event payloads.
fields.timeoutSecondsHelp: Stop overly long runs before they block later schedules.
fields.agentIdHelp: Pin this task to a specific OpenClaw agent when your runtime has multiple agents.
fields.agentIdDefaultHelp: Leave this on the default route to follow the connected instance's current default agent, now {{name}} ({{agentId}}).
fields.agentIdUnavailableHelp: This task is still pinned to {{agentId}}, but that agent is no longer available from the connected instance.
fields.agentIdCatalogHelp: Agent choices are read from the connected instance. Pick a specific agent only when this cron job must stay pinned to that agent.
fields.modelHelp: Optional provider/model or alias override for agent-turn tasks.
fields.thinkingHelp: Override the reasoning depth for supported GPT-5 and Codex models.
fields.lightContextHelp: Skip heavyweight workspace bootstrap when the task only needs lightweight context.
fields.toolAllowlistHelp: Enter one tool or group token per line. Leave blank to keep the upstream default tool policy.
fields.toolAllowlistTokensHelp: Accepts tool ids like exec or read, plus group:* shorthands such as group:filesystem.
fields.deliveryBestEffortHelp: Avoid failing the whole cron run when downstream delivery has a transient issue.

modal.createSubtitle: Capture the task intent first, then define how it should run and deliver.
modal.editSubtitle: Update schedule, prompt, and execution behavior without losing context.

workspace.navigationHint: Switch between focused sections instead of scrolling through one long form.
workspace.overviewDescription: Give the task a clear name, context, and default state.
workspace.promptDescription: Define the core job the task should complete each time it runs.
workspace.scheduleDescription: Choose the timing model that best matches this workflow.
workspace.runtimeDescription: Decide how the task session wakes up and what it executes.
workspace.deliveryDescription: Control whether outcomes are published and where they should go.
workspace.commonConfigDescription: Keep the most-used setup controls up front for faster creation.
workspace.advancedDescription: Open expert controls only when you need deeper scheduling precision.
workspace.cronManagedInAdvanced: Cron mode keeps the raw expression in Advanced so the main flow stays cleaner.
workspace.executionAdvancedDescription: Tune guardrails and limits for longer-running task executions.
workspace.executionSafeguardsDescription: Timeouts help prevent a stuck execution from delaying the next scheduled run or keeping a shared runtime busy.

isolated.title: Isolated session
isolated.description: Start a fresh execution context for safer, repeatable runs.

current.title: Current session
current.description: Bind the task to the session that is active when you create it.

custom.title: Custom session
custom.description: Run inside a named persistent session so context can accumulate across runs.

main.title: Main session
main.description: Reuse the primary session when you want continuity with existing context.

immediate.title: Wake immediately
immediate.description: Start the execution as soon as the schedule triggers.

nextCycle.title: Next cycle
nextCycle.description: Queue the task for the next runtime cycle instead of interrupting immediately.

runAssistantTask.title: Run assistant task
runAssistantTask.description: Launch a task-style assistant run using the prompt as the work order.

sendPromptMessage.title: Send prompt message
sendPromptMessage.description: Send the prompt as a direct message-style execution.

publishSummary.title: Publish summary
publishSummary.description: Deliver the outcome to a downstream channel after execution completes.

webhook.title: Webhook
webhook.description: POST the finished cron payload to an external HTTP endpoint.

none.title: No delivery
none.description: Run the task without publishing a summary externally.

history.title: Execution history
history.subtitle: Recent runs for {{name}}
history.description: Inspect recent executions, outcomes, and delivery details.
history.emptyDescription: This task has not produced any recorded runs yet.

validation.title: Task is not ready yet
validation.description: Complete the required setup before saving this task.
validation.neutral: Fill in the task details and execution settings to enable save.
validation.ready: This task is ready to save.
validation.activeInstanceRequired: Select an active instance before creating or editing tasks.
validation.cronExpressionInvalid: Enter a valid 5- or 6-field cron expression.
validation.staggerMsInvalid: Enter a valid non-negative stagger window in milliseconds.
validation.timeoutSecondsInvalid: Enter a valid positive timeout in seconds.
validation.recipientInvalid: Enter a valid HTTP(S) webhook URL.

toasts.noActiveInstance: Select an active instance before creating tasks.

page.confirmDelete: Delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
